Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a sun terrace, garden, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a shared kitchen, coffee shop, outdoor seating area, and bicycle parking.
Delicious Breakfast: A continental and vegetarian breakfast is served daily, featuring warm dishes, juice, and fruits. Menus cater to special diets.

hotels.description_en:
Central Location: Casa Carmel Bed & Breakfast in Guatemala City offers a central location with the National Palace Guatemala a 14-minute walk away and the Cathedral of Guatemala City 1.2 km nearby. La Aurora Airport is 6 km from the property.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy a sun terrace, garden, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a paid shuttle service, daily housekeeping, outdoor seating area, tour desk, and luggage storage.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature private bathrooms with free toiletries, hairdryers, work desks, seating areas, TVs, parquet floors, and wardrobes. Balconies and patios offer garden or city views.
Local Attractions: Nearby attractions include the Popol Vuh Museum (4.7 km), Miraflores Museum (6 km), and La Aurora Zoo (6 km).
